title: Daisy
description: Useful library, used in cao-awa's mods.
body:
Daisy is a useful library, used in cao-awa's mods, includes [Sepals](https://modrinth.com/mod/sepals). [Annuus](https://modrinth.com/mod/annuus), [Conium](https://modrinth.com/mod/conium), [Lycrois](https://modrinth.com/mod/lycoris) and future projects.

Daisy has collection factors, the [Catheter](https://github.com/cao-awa/Catheter) and other utils.

You can also use this library in your mods!
